{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Heaven’s Glory Striker technique
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Heaven's Glory]] [[Striker technique]] was wiped out by the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
